description.content: Defines the minute when the flow runs (e.g., 0 for on the hour, */5 for every 5 minutes).
Defines the hour when the flow runs (e.g., 0 for midnight, 14 for 2 PM).
Defines the day of the month when the flow runs (e.g., 1 for first day, 15 for mid-month).
Defines the month when the flow runs (e.g., 1 for January, 12 for December).
Defines the weekday when the flow runs (e.g., 0 or SUN for Sunday, MON-FRI for weekdays).

A Cron Job is a scheduled task that runs automatically at specified intervals, typically defined using cron expressions. It is commonly used to automate repetitive operations such as data processing, system maintenance, and periodic updates without requiring manual execution.

signature: (cronMinute: CRON_MINUTE, cronHour: CRON_HOUR, cronDayOfMonth: CRON_DAY_OF_MONTH, cronMonth: CRON_MONTH, cronDayOfWeek: CRON_DAY_OF_WEEK): void
